meanings.definition: the process whereby water particles become visible in the sky

examples: Fall weather often overcasts our beaches
The stars are obscured by the clouds
the big elm tree obscures our view of the valley

meanings.definition: billow up in the form of a cloud
examples: The smoke clouded above the houses
Their faces were clouded with sadness

meanings.definition: place under suspicion or cast doubt upon

examples: the stroke clouded memories of her youth

meanings.definition: colour with streaks or blotches of different shades

examples: The chemical clouded the liquid to which it was added
